  <title value="CDA - FR Organisme assurance maladie"/>
  <status value="draft"/>
  <date value="2026-06-09T14:42:35+00:00"/>
  <publisher
             value="Agence du Numérique en Santé (ANS) - 2-10 Rue d'Oradour-sur-Glane, 75015 Paris"/>
  <contact>
    <name
          value="Agence du Numérique en Santé (ANS) - 2-10 Rue d'Oradour-sur-Glane, 75015 Paris"/>
    <telecom>
      <system value="url"/>
      <value value="https://esante.gouv.fr"/>
    </telecom>
  </contact>
  <description
               value="Entrée FR-Organisme-assurance-maladie: IHE-PCC - Payers-entry. L'entrée Organisme d'assurance maladie est une entrée permettant de décrire un organisme d'assurance maladie."/>
  <jurisdiction>
    <coding>
      <system value="urn:iso:std:iso:3166"/>
      <code value="FR"/>
      <display value="FRANCE"/>
    </coding>
  </jurisdiction>
  <fhirVersion value="4.0.1"/>
  <mapping>
    <identity value="rim"/>
    <uri value="http://hl7.org/v3"/>
    <name value="RIM Mapping"/>
  </mapping>
  <kind value="logical"/>
  <abstract value="false"/>
  <type value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
  <baseDefinition
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
  <derivation value="constraint"/>
  <snapshot>
    <extension
               url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/snapshot-base-version">
      <valueString value="2.0.1-sd"/>
    </extension>
    <element id="Act">
      <path value="Act"/>
      <short value="Base for all types and resources"/>
      <definition
                  value="Defines the basic properties of every data value. This is an abstract type, meaning that no value can be just a data value without belonging to any concrete type. Every concrete type is a specialization of this general abstract DataValue type."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Base"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="n/a"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId">
      <path value="Act.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Act.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.root">
      <path value="Act.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Act.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.templateId">
      <path value="Act.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="3"/>
      <max value="3"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.templateId:ihePayerEntry">
      <path value="Act.templateId"/>

      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

    <element id="Act.templateId:ihePayerEntry.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.templateId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>

        <max value="1"/>

      <base>
        <path value="Act.classCode"/>

        <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>

        <valueSet

      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.id"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code">
      <path value="Act.code"/>
      <short value="Type de couverture sociale"/>
      <definition value="Type de couverture sociale"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.code"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-couverture-sociale-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.code.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.code">
      <path value="Act.code.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="Act.code.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.codeSystemName">
      <path value="Act.code.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.codeSystemVersion">
      <path value="Act.code.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.displayName">
      <path value="Act.code.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.code.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.code.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.originalText">
      <path value="Act.code.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.qualifier">
      <path value="Act.code.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>

    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.translation">
      <path value="Act.code.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.text">
      <path value="Act.text"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.text"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode">
      <path value="Act.statusCode"/>
      <short value="Statut de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Statut de l'entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.statusCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActStatus"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.statusCode.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.code">
      <path value="Act.statusCode.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="completed"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.codeSystem">
      <path value="Act.statusCode.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.codeSystemName">
      <path value="Act.statusCode.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.codeSystemVersion">
      <path value="Act.statusCode.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.displayName">
      <path value="Act.statusCode.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.statusCode.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.statusCode.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>

    </element>

    </element>
    <element id="Act.languageCode">
      <path value="Act.languageCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.languageCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      </type>
      <binding>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Specimen"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer">
      <path value="Act.performer"/>
      <short value="Organisme de couverture sociale"/>
      <definition value="Organisme de couverture sociale"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.performer"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Performer2"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.performer.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.performer.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.typeId">
      <path value="Act.performer.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.performer.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.performer.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Act.performer.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.typeId.root">
      <path value="Act.performer.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Act.performer.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.templateId">
      <path value="Act.performer.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.typeCode">
      <path value="Act.performer.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Performer2.typeCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <fixedCode value="PRF"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ParticipationPhysicalPerformer"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.sdtcFunctionCode">

                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="functionCode"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.performer.sdtcFunctionCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Performer2.sdtcFunctionCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.time">
      <path value="Act.performer.time"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Performer2.time"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.modeCode">
      <path value="Act.performer.modeCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Performer2.modeCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.assignedEntity">
      <path value="Act.performer.assignedEntity"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>

    <element id="Act.performer.assignedEntity.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.performer.assignedEntity.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.assignedEntity.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.performer.assignedEntity.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.assignedEntity.typeId">
      <path value="Act.performer.assignedEntity.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.performer.assignedEntity.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.performer.assignedEntity.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>

    <element id="Act.performer.assignedEntity.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="Act.performer.assignedEntity.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>

      <path
            value="Act.performer.assignedEntity.representedOrganization.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>

      <max value="*"/>

    <element
             id="Act.performer.assignedEntity.representedOrganization.typeId">
      <path
            value="Act.performer.assignedEntity.representedOrganization.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>

             id="Act.performer.assignedEntity.representedOrganization.typeId.nullFlavor">

    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantBeneficiaire.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <binding>

        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>

    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantBeneficiaire.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>

      <max value="*"/>

        <min value="0"/>

    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantBeneficiaire.typeId">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantBeneficiaire.typeId.nullFlavor">

      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>

    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.root">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.templateId">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.typeCode">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="REFR"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.inversionInd">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.negationInd">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.sequenceNumber">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.sequenceNumber"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.sequenceNumber"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/INT"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.seperatableInd">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.seperatableInd"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.seperatableInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/BL"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.act"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.typeId">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition

The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>

                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <label value="Displayable"/>

      <base>

        <min value="0"/>

      </base>

      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>

      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.templateId">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>

      </base>
      <type>

    </element>

      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.classCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.classCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="ACT"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActClassDocumentEntryAct|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>

                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xDocumentActMood|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>

      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.id">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.id"/>
      <short value="Identifiant du plan de soins"/>
      <definition value="Identifiant du plan de soins"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.id"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.code">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.code"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActCode"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text"/>
      <short value="Plan de soins"/>
      <definition value="Plan de soins"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.text"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.compression">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.compression"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Compression"/>
      <definition
                  value="Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.compression"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDACompressionAlgorithm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.integrityCheck">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.integrityCheck"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check"/>
      <definition
                  value="The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheck"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="base64Binary"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bin"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.integrityCheckAlgorithm">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Integrity Check Algorithm"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.integrityCheckAlgorithm"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-IntegrityCheckAlgorithm|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.language">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.language"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Language"/>
      <definition
                  value="For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.language"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.mediaType">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.mediaType"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Media Type"/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies the type of the encapsulated data and identifies a method to interpret or render the data."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.mediaType"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-MediaType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.representation">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.representation"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.representation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/BinaryDataEncoding"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.xmlText">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.xmlText"/>
      <representation value="xmlText"/>
      <short
             value="Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string."/>
      <definition
                  value="Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)"/>
      <comment
               value="This element is represented in XML as textual content. The actual name &quot;xmlText&quot; will not appear in a CDA instance."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.xmlText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.reference">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.reference"/>
      <label value="Reference"/>
      <short value="Référence vers la partie narrative contenant le texte."/>
      <definition
                  value="A telecommunication address (TEL), such as a URL for HTTP or FTP, which will resolve to precisely the same binary data that could as well have been provided as inline data."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>

    <element id="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.thumbnail">
      <path value="Act.entryRelationship.act.text.thumbnail"/>
      <label value="Thumbnail"/>
      <definition
                  value="An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ED.thumbnail"/>
        <min value="0"/>
